checks.name: bueep_4e Section 6.3 prequalification limits

step_1_notes.description: Protected zone length measured from column face

step_1_notes.requirement: La placa de extremo debe conectarse al ala de la columna.

step_1_notes.description: Altura derivada de placa de extremo
Geometria end-plate de viga a derecha
step_1_notes.requirement: h1_vgder, h2_vgder y dh_vgder para trazabilidad geometrica
step_1_notes.formula: h1=d-0.5tf+pfo; h2=d-1.5tf-pfi; dh=d+1/16 in (db<=7/8 in) else dh=d+1/8 in

step_1_notes.description: Altura derivada de placa de extremo
Geometria end-plate de viga a izquierda
step_1_notes.requirement: h1_vgizq, h2_vgizq y dh_vgizq para trazabilidad geometrica
step_1_notes.formula: h1=d-0.5tf+pfo; h2=d-1.5tf-pfi; dh=d+1/16 in (db<=7/8 in) else dh=d+1/8 in

step_1_notes.description: Derived end-plate stiffener geometry and detailing edge requirement
step_1_notes.formula: h_pest_vgder = pfo_pe_vgder + de_pe_vgder; L_pest_vgder = h_pest_vgder/tan(30 deg); Ed_pest_vgder = 25 mm

step_1_notes.description: Derived end-plate stiffener geometry and detailing edge requirement
step_1_notes.formula: h_pest_vgizq = pfo_pe_vgizq + de_pe_vgizq; L_pest_vgizq = h_pest_vgizq/tan(30 deg); Ed_pest_vgizq = 25 mm

step_1_notes.description: Secuencia de soldadura para conexiones end-plate rigidizadas
step_1_notes.requirement: Para conexiones end-plate rigidizadas, la soldadura entre el ala de la viga y la placa de extremo debe ejecutarse antes de instalar el rigidizador.

step_1_notes.description: Excepcion de respaldo en la raiz cerca del alma de la viga
step_1_notes.requirement: No se requiere respaldo en la raiz del ala, directamente por encima y por debajo del alma de la viga, en una longitud igual a 1.5k1. En esa ubicacion se permite una soldadura de ranura PJP de profundidad completa.
Los requisitos de instalacion deben cumplir con las AISC Seismic Provisions y con la especificacion RCSC, salvo que este estandar indique lo contrario.

step_1_notes.description: Quality control and quality assurance for bolted assemblies
step_1_notes.requirement: El control de calidad y el aseguramiento de calidad deben cumplir con las AISC Seismic Provisions.

step_1_limits.description: Familia de perfil de viga permitida para precalificacion (viga izquierda)
Familia de perfil de viga permitida para precalificacion (viga derecha)
End-plate width vs beam flange width (left beam)

Length without shear connectors from column face (left beam)

step_1_limits.description: Clear span-to-depth ratio by frame system (left beam)

step_1_limits.clause: AISC 341-22w / AISC 358-22w Section 2.3.4 (6) + AISC Seismic Provisions

step_1_limits.description: Requisitos de soldadura entre ala de viga y placa de extremo (viga derecha)
step_1_limits.verification_text: si demanda_ductilidad_vgder in {high, moderate}: tipo_w4_vgder == cjp; t_w4_1_vgder == 0 mm; demanda_ductilidad_vgder = high; tipo_w4_vgder = cjp; t_w4_1_vgder = 0.000 mm

step_1_limits.description: Requisitos de soldadura entre ala de viga y placa de extremo (viga izquierda)
step_1_limits.verification_text: si demanda_ductilidad_vgizq in {high, moderate}: tipo_w4_vgizq == cjp; t_w4_1_vgizq == 0 mm; demanda_ductilidad_vgizq = high; tipo_w4_vgizq = cjp; t_w4_1_vgizq = 0.000 mm

step_1_limits.description: End-plate to beam-web weld type shall be an allowed category (right beam)
Tipo de soldadura de end-plate con rigidizador segun espesor del rigidizador (viga derecha)
step_1_limits.verification_text: si t_pest_vgder > 10.000 mm: tipo_w1_vgder == cjp; dato faltante: t_pest_vgder

step_1_limits.description: Tipo de soldadura de viga con rigidizador segun espesor del rigidizador (viga derecha)
step_1_limits.verification_text: si t_pest_vgder > 10.000 mm: tipo_w2_vgder == cjp; dato faltante: t_pest_vgder

step_1_limits.description: Tipo de soldadura de viga con rigidizador segun espesor del rigidizador (viga izquierda)
step_1_limits.verification_text: si t_pest_vgizq > 10.000 mm: tipo_w2_vgizq == cjp; dato faltante: t_pest_vgizq

step_1_limits.description: Continuity-plate weld type shall be explicitly declared with an allowed weld category
Continuity-plate weld type when plate thickness is less than or equal to 3/8 in (10 mm)
Bolt tightening type must be one recognized category
Bolts shall be pretensioned unless a specific connection permits otherwise
Bolt fabrication standard must be an allowed high-strength ASTM designation
step_1_limits.limit_symbol: {ASTM F3125/F3125M, ASTM A325, ASTM A325M, ASTM A490, ASTM A490M, ASTM F1852, ASTM F2280}

step_1_limits.description: Edge distance at de (right beam)
Outside bolt-row distance limits (right beam)
step_1_limits.verification_text: pso_pe_vgder (=pfo_pe_vgder) >= emin; pfo_pe_vgder <= 114 mm; pfo_pe_vgder >= 38 mm

step_1_limits.description: Inside bolt-row distance limits (right beam)
step_1_limits.verification_text: pfi_pe_vgder >= emin; pfi_pe_vgder <= 114 mm; pfi_pe_vgder >= 38 mm; psi_pe_vgder = pfi_pe_vgder + tf_vgder - tcp_col; psi_pe_vgder > 0

calculation_memory.equation: Step 1 PREQUALIFICATION LIMITS: compute each geometric value and compare directly against Table 6.1 limits using calculated vs limit checks (>= or <=, no DCR format).

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 2 probable maximum moment at plastic hinge
checks.clause: Chapter 6 / Section 6.7.1 Step 2 + Eq. (2.4-1) and Eq. (2.4-2)

calculation_memory.equation: Mpr = Cpr * Ry * Fy * Ze

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 3 plastic hinge distance from column face
checks.clause: Chapter 6 / Section 6.7.1 Step 3 + Eq. (6.7-1) and Eq. (6.7-2)

calculation_memory.equation: Sh_vglado = min(d_vglado/2, 3*bf_vglado) [4E] o Sh_vglado = L_pest_vglado + tpe_vglado [4ES/8ES]

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 4 shear force at plastic hinge

calculation_memory.equation: Vhmax = 2*Mpr/Lh + Vgravity; Vhmin = 2*Mpr/Lh - Vgravity (Eq. 2.4-3, side-specific der/izq)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 5 probable maximum moment at face of column

calculation_memory.equation: Mfmax = Mpr + Vhmax*Sh; Mfmin = Mpr + Vhmin*Sh (Eq. 2.4-4, side-specific der/izq)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 21.5.1 column panel-zone web shear (WPZS)
checks.clause: AISC 360-22w Section J10.6 + Eq. (J10-9) to Eq. (J10-12)

calculation_memory.equation: Rn_wpzs_col = 0.60*Fy_col*d_col*tw_col (J10-9)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 6.1 bolt tension rupture capacity (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_b_p+_vgizq = Mf_vgizq_critico/(2*(h1_pe_vgizq + h2_pe_vgizq)); phi*Rn_b_p+_vgizq = phi * Rn_b_p+_vgizq, Rn_b_p+_vgizq = A_b_vgizq * Fnt_b_vgizq, A_b_vgizq = pi*db^2/4 (AISC 360-22 J3.7)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 6.2 bolt shear rupture capacity (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_b_v2_vgizq = Vh_vgizq_critico/n_b_vgizq, phi*Rn_b_v2_vgizq = phi * Rn_b_v2_vgizq, Rn_b_v2_vgizq = A_b_vgizq * Fnv_b_vgizq, A_b_vgizq = pi*db^2/4, n_b_vgizq = 4 (4E/4ES) or 8 (8ES) (AISC 360-22 J3.7)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 7.1.1 end-plate flexural yielding (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_pe_m3_vgizq = Mf_vgizq_critico; phi*Rn_pe_m3_vgizq = phi * tpe_vgizq^2 * Fyp_pe_vgizq * Yp_pe_vgizq (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-8)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 7.2.1 end-plate shear yielding (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_pe_v1_vgizq = Mf_vgizq_critico / (2*(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq)); phi*Rn_pe_v1_vgizq = phi * 0.6 * Fyp_pe_vgizq * bpe_vgizq * tpe_vgizq (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-10)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 7.2.2 end-plate shear rupture (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Rn_pe_v2_vgizq = Ru_pe_m3_vgizq / (2*(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq)); phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgizq = phi * 0.6 * Fup_pe_vgizq * tpe_vgizq * (bpe_vgizq - 2*(dh_pe_vgizq + 1.6 mm)) (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-12)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 7.3.1 end-plate hole tearout (left)

calculation_memory.equation: lc_pe_vgizq = pfo_pe_vgizq + pfi_pe_vgizq + tf_vgizq - dh_pe_vgizq; Ru_pe_v2_vgizq = Vh_vgizq_critico / n_b_vgizq; phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgizq = phi * 1.2 * lc_pe_vgizq * tpe_vgizq * Fup_pe_vgizq (AISC 360-22 J3.11a)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 7.3.2 end-plate hole bearing (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_pe_v2_vgizq = Vh_vgizq_critico / n_b_vgizq; phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgizq = phi * 2.4 * d_b_vgizq * tpe_vgizq * Fup_pe_vgizq (AISC 360-22 J3.11a)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 12.1.1 column flange local bending (LFB) (left)

calculation_memory.equation: tcf >= 1.11 Mf / (phi_d * d * Fyc * Yc) (Eq. 6.7-13)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 13.1.1 column web local yielding (WLY) (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_cf_v2_col_vgizq = Mf_vgizq_critico/(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq); lb_col = tf_vgizq + 2w_w4_vgizq + 2*tpe_vgizq; phi*Rn_cf_v2_col_vgizq = phi_ductil * (6*Ct_col*kc_col + lb_col) * Fy_col * tw_col

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 14.2.1 column web local crippling (WLC) (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_cw_v2_col_vgizq = Mf_vgizq_critico/(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq); lb_col = tf_vgizq + 2w_w4_vgizq + 2*tpe_vgizq; phi*Rn_cw_v2_col_vgizq = phi_wlc * Rn_eq(6.7-19/6.7-20/6.7-21); DCR_cw_v2_col_vgizq = Ru_cw_v2_col_vgizq / phi*Rn_cw_v2_col_vgizq

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 14.2.2 column web local buckling (WCB) (left)

calculation_memory.equation: No aplica: Faltan datos para evaluar la condicion de aplicabilidad de WCB: loads.Mu3_vgizq, loads.Mu3_vgder

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 11.1.1 beam web-to-end-plate weld tension rupture (left)

calculation_memory.equation: CJP => cumple; Ru_w3_p+_vgizq = Fy_vgizq * tw_vgizq * hwef_w3_vgizq, hwef_w3_vgizq = pfi_pe_vgizq + pb_pe_vgizq + 150 mm

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 6.1 bolt tension rupture capacity (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_b_p+_vgder = Mf_vgder_critico/(2*(h1_pe_vgder + h2_pe_vgder)); phi*Rn_b_p+_vgder = phi * Rn_b_p+_vgder, Rn_b_p+_vgder = A_b_vgder * Fnt_b_vgder, A_b_vgder = pi*db^2/4 (AISC 360-22 J3.7)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 6.2 bolt shear rupture capacity (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_b_v2_vgder = Vh_vgder_critico/n_b_vgder, phi*Rn_b_v2_vgder = phi * Rn_b_v2_vgder, Rn_b_v2_vgder = A_b_vgder * Fnv_b_vgder, A_b_vgder = pi*db^2/4, n_b_vgder = 4 (4E/4ES) or 8 (8ES) (AISC 360-22 J3.7)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 7.1.1 end-plate flexural yielding (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_pe_m3_vgder = Mf_vgder_critico; phi*Rn_pe_m3_vgder = phi * tpe_vgder^2 * Fyp_pe_vgder * Yp_pe_vgder (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-8)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 7.2.1 end-plate shear yielding (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_pe_v1_vgder = Mf_vgder_critico / (2*(d_vgder - tf_vgder)); phi*Rn_pe_v1_vgder = phi * 0.6 * Fyp_pe_vgder * bpe_vgder * tpe_vgder (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-10)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 7.2.2 end-plate shear rupture (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Rn_pe_v2_vgder = Ru_pe_m3_vgder / (2*(d_vgder - tf_vgder)); phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgder = phi * 0.6 * Fup_pe_vgder * tpe_vgder * (bpe_vgder - 2*(dh_pe_vgder + 1.6 mm)) (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-12)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 7.3.1 end-plate hole tearout (right)

calculation_memory.equation: lc_pe_vgder = pfo_pe_vgder + pfi_pe_vgder + tf_vgder - dh_pe_vgder; Ru_pe_v2_vgder = Vh_vgder_critico / n_b_vgder; phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgder = phi * 1.2 * lc_pe_vgder * tpe_vgder * Fup_pe_vgder (AISC 360-22 J3.11a)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 7.3.2 end-plate hole bearing (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_pe_v2_vgder = Vh_vgder_critico / n_b_vgder; phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgder = phi * 2.4 * d_b_vgder * tpe_vgder * Fup_pe_vgder (AISC 360-22 J3.11a)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 12.1.1 column flange local bending (LFB) (right)

calculation_memory.equation: tcf >= 1.11 Mf / (phi_d * d * Fyc * Yc) (Eq. 6.7-13)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 13.1.1 column web local yielding (WLY) (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_cf_v2_col_vgder = Mf_vgder_critico/(d_vgder - tf_vgder); lb_col = tf_vgder + 2w_w4_vgder + 2*tpe_vgder; phi*Rn_cf_v2_col_vgder = phi_ductil * (6*Ct_col*kc_col + lb_col) * Fy_col * tw_col

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 14.2.1 column web local crippling (WLC) (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_cw_v2_col_vgder = Mf_vgder_critico/(d_vgder - tf_vgder); lb_col = tf_vgder + 2w_w4_vgder + 2*tpe_vgder; phi*Rn_cw_v2_col_vgder = phi_wlc * Rn_eq(6.7-19/6.7-20/6.7-21); DCR_cw_v2_col_vgder = Ru_cw_v2_col_vgder / phi*Rn_cw_v2_col_vgder

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 14.2.2 column web local buckling (WCB) (right)

calculation_memory.equation: No aplica: Faltan datos para evaluar la condicion de aplicabilidad de WCB: loads.Mu3_vgder, loads.Mu3_vgizq

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 11.1.1 beam web-to-end-plate weld tension rupture (right)

calculation_memory.equation: CJP => cumple; Ru_w3_p+_vgder = Fy_vgder * tw_vgder * hwef_w3_vgder, hwef_w3_vgder = pfi_pe_vgder + pb_pe_vgder + 150 mm
